bound_census_evidence.evidence_boundary: large-scale-fast sequence/developability census only; official validator, AbNatiV, Sapiens, TNP, structure, and docking remain deferred

claim_boundary: V2 implementation preregistration only. No seen200 production selection, docking, binding, affinity, competition, Docking Gold, experimental blocking, or final-submission claim.
required_regressions: known hard-fail candidates in C0139 C0500 C0509 C0533 cannot be selected even with dominant model scores
census TSV receipt audit and independent-verification tamper fail closed
hash-control identity is invariant under full model score uncertainty and disagreement perturbation
missing experimental_labels_read fails closed in summary and receipt
PASS and FAIL 4 3 2 1 quotas and all V1 exclusions remain exact
no production outputs are created by freeze construction
all three sealed-label accepted-path counters missing or nonzero fail closed in both deployment summary and receipt

v2_mandatory_gates.control_policy: pre-reserve one ascending seeded SHA256 control per parent before every other bucket and exclude it from every model-ranked/diversity bucket
v2_mandatory_gates.fast_hard_fail_policy: exclude fast_hard_fail=true before any score-ranked bucket or diversity/control acquisition; verify zero selected overlap
v2_mandatory_gates.sealed_label_field_policy: prospective_test_labels_read, v4f_labels_read, and experimental_labels_read must each be explicitly present and boolean false; prospective_test_label_paths_accepted, v4f_label_paths_accepted, and experimental_label_paths_accepted must each be explicitly present and integer zero in both deployment summary and receipt
